---
title: 'The Great Divide: Light VS Darkness'
date: '2012-05-02T15:48:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3332797929209465828'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/the-great-divide-light-vs-darkness.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Studies'
  - 'Faith'
  - 'Sensitive Issues'
  - 'News and Current Events'
---

<div style="text-align: justify;"><b>The Great Divide:</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;">I know, I know... don't get in a debate on a website... I know I shouldn't but I do anyway sometimes. It's like casting pearl before swine... but at the same time, MAYBE someone else will benefit from seeing at least ONE person in the room make sense. So I did it. I had a debate in a comment thread on a science site. However...</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br />As I look back at that&nbsp;<a href="http://www.space.com/9699-top-10-strangest-space.html?fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524#f17c8b828" target="_blank">comment thread</a> that took place on a science site I am reminded of the great divide. As this world get's near it's end, the coming of Jesus, and the great tribulation... We are seeing a draw down of beliefs. Did you know&nbsp;atheism&nbsp;isn't the main enemy thought/teaching that the bible is concerned about.&nbsp;Atheism&nbsp;has no grounding in reality, so it can't hold very long. Scientists, serious scientists, are starting to look beyond&nbsp;atheism&nbsp;to&nbsp;pantheism, and other religious beliefs. They are even turning to alien worship and "channeling", which means talking to aliens through meditation and allowing them to talk through you... sound familiar bible students?</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /><b>Divide in Politics:</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-great-divide1-293be6c36942.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-great-divide1-b7d308e8127d.jpg" width="320" /></a>The world is becoming divided. Politics more&nbsp;polarized. People are starting to draw a line. This side of that side. You find liberals unable to comprehend why those backward conservatives cling to their outdated beliefs. You see conservatives baffled as to how those liberals could take such an obvious path to economic destruction. Social has NEVER worked. Ever. Liberals say that the trouble in the world today is the result of the failure of&nbsp;capitalism.&nbsp;Conservatives say that it's not capitalism that has failed but the socialist constructs that have been trying to replace it for decades.&nbsp;Socialism, through actions like <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Troubled_Asset_Relief_Program" target="_blank">TARP</a>, <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sarbanes%E2%80%93Oxley_Act" target="_blank">Sarbanes-Oxley</a>, <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dodd-Frank_Wall_Street_Reform_and_Consumer_Protection_Act" target="_blank">Dodd-Frank</a>, <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Obamacare" target="_blank">Obamacare</a>, and other programs before and after; has&nbsp;squeezed the life dout of the economy, preventing institutions that should have failed and cleaned out the economic system from failing. The results has been that instead of being very bad for a short time and bouncing back, thereby purging the virus... the&nbsp;economy&nbsp;has been given&nbsp;morphine&nbsp;to ease the pain but no cure from the virus.&nbsp;</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: justify;">The economy wasn't as bad as it could have been at first.. but rather than a quick recovery the US and World have been plunged into a prolonged illness, spiraling downward, with no good solutions or cures in sight. Left to itself this will eventually cause the total failure of every major country in the world and world wide chaos. This is all happening because some people who didn't understand economy thought that there were companies that were "Too Big To Fail". This came from unions more interested in fattening union bosses pockets that saving the country/world. Unions, another socialist&nbsp;construct. Unions used to be a beneficial part of negotiating, but have not become anti-progress, anti-profit, anti-benefit. They actually hurt the economy and kill jobs and long term growth for the people who pay them to protect them. I worked for one for three years, I know. Unions, almost without exception, are evil.&nbsp;</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><b>Divide in Science:</b><br />We all came from evolution (or more popular now: we came from aliens or even ascended beings). Non-Believers in the Bible have&nbsp;hijacked&nbsp;science, just like they hijacked the liberal party in&nbsp;politics. It is now ridiculed if you bring up God or Bible in a science discussion, yet it was Christians that led science for the majority of the history of the world.<br /><br />Almost all major breakthroughs in science for the past 2,000 years have come from people who believed that a God of order created this world. If a God of order created this world, there must be order in it. It is out job to discover and take advantage of that order. Indeed, science has found order at the smallest levels. Micro-Biology finds bacteria that is built like a machine. These bacteria can be seen in "Darwin's Black Box", which was understandably rejected by a community more interested in preserving a godless science than seeking the truth.<br /><br />Then we see men like George Washington Carver. He discovered hundreds of uses for peanuts and other things.</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><blockquote class="tr_bq"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Washington_Carver" target="_blank">George Washington Carver - Wiki</a>:<br /><i>George Washington Carver believed he could have faith both in God and science and integrated them into his life. <b>He testified on many occasions that his faith in&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jesus" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Jesus">Jesus</a>&nbsp;was the only mechanism by which he could effectively pursue and perform the art of science.</b><sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-53" style="line-height: 1em;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Washington_Carver#cite_note-53" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[54]</a></sup>&nbsp;George Washington Carver became a Christian when he was ten years old. When he was still a young boy, he was not expected to live past his twenty-first birthday due to failing health. He lived well past the age of twenty-one, and his belief deepened as a result.<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-jjcxob_21-1" style="line-height: 1em;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Washington_Carver#cite_note-jjcxob-21" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[22]</a></sup>&nbsp;Throughout his career, he always found friendship with other Christians. He relied on them especially when criticized by the scientific community and media regarding his research methodology.<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-54" style="line-height: 1em;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Washington_Carver#cite_note-54" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[55]</a></sup></i><i>Carver viewed faith in&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jesus" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Jesus">Jesus</a>&nbsp;as a means of destroying both barriers of racial disharmony and social stratification.<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-55" style="line-height: 1em;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Washington_Carver#cite_note-55" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[56]</a></sup>&nbsp;He was as concerned with his students' character development as he was with their intellectual development. He compiled a list of eight cardinal virtues for his students to strive toward:</i></blockquote></div>He was also discussed here:<br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><blockquote class="tr_bq">The <a href="http://www.kcm.org/bvov-media" target="_blank">KCM BVOV Broadcasts</a> with Kenneth Copeland and Bill Winston talked a lot about Tuskegee and George Washington Carver:<br /><ul><li><a href="http://www.kcm.org/bvov-media">http://www.kcm.org/bvov-media</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://draft.blogger.com/goog_367082217">Speak the BLESSING: April 2nd - April 6th 2012</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://www.kcm.org/bvov-media" target="_blank">The BLESSING is Love Manifested: April 9th-April 13th 2012</a></li></ul></blockquote></div><div style="text-align: justify;">People in science are either starting from a view point that there is a God and discovering things. Or they are starting from a view point that there is NO God and discovering things. They draw their radically different conclusions from these view points.<br /><br /><b>Great Divide at Work:</b><br /><br />At work places all over the country; acceptance and tolerance are preached, enforced, and demanded. One cannot say anything about Jesus or Heaven/Hell or Bible in an authoritative way without being called out on it as intolerant and causing trouble in the workplace. However work places are openly celebrating homosexuality as a cause to be championed, as though it were equal to being a black or other minority who needed civil rights.<br /><br />The Bible Believing Christian knows that homosexuality is at best a choice and at worst a biological/psychological disorder. It is not something you must be or have. In fact, scientifically speaking, it is more closely related to addiction that race. You are not born gay any more than you are born a crack addict or alcoholic. Homosexuality, as with all addictions, is based on biological, psychological, and environmental factors. As with all addictions, there are patterns that are common to many addicts, but there are no one set of factors common to all. It is not like a matter of having X,Y, and Z always makes you gay, or that all gays have X,Y, and Z. But there are strong patterns showing that many, if not most, do contain common threads of patterns, and that those patterns are more prevelant among gays than any non gay group.<br /><br /><b>Great Divide Worsened by Ignorance:</b><br /><br />What makes these divides worse is that Christians fail to research or understand things and make blanket comments about a subject that they don't understand. These things make them sound ridiculous to the person who has taken time to think this through and is looking for real answers.<br /><br />Also, Non-Christians&nbsp;fail to understand the real answers Christianity provides because they look to the highlighted loud answers given by people who don't understand. They don't seek to understand us, we don't seek to understand their need for real answers.<br /><br /><b>The Answer:</b><br />We need to pray. Find out from God what our part is. The great divide will only get MORE polarized as Jesus' return draws near. People are being forced to choose. There is no middle. There is no fence to sit on. EVERYONE on this planet will make a choice before the return of Jesus. So we must be there to answer those who are still making the choice. We can somewhat ignore those who don't care, who have made their choice. But we must be ready to answer them, for the benefit of those who are listening to both sides.<br /><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/divide-2a497a3d86b0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/divide-2a497a3d86b0.jpg" /></a>Does that mean you need to find an answer to every question and be the expert on every subject? NO! But you have a part to play. Become SURE about what you know, find answers for yourself. Show people the places they can get good answers.<br /><br />Ultimately, though, there is ONE way people are going to see the truth. LIGHT. Light comes as Christians take the words of Jesus in <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/mark/passage.aspx?q=mark+16:15-20" target="_blank">Mark 16:15-20</a>: Those who believe will have signs following them... He will confirm His Word with Signs Following. As we walk in The Anointing of God, casting out devils, speaking in new&nbsp;tongues, healing the sick, raising the dead, etc... we take the Authority that was given in <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/1-28.html" target="_blank">Genesis 1:28</a>, stolen from us in <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/3.html" target="_blank">Genesis 3</a>, and returned to us in&nbsp;<a href="http://bible.cc/galatians/3-13.htm" target="_blank">Galatians&nbsp;3:13</a>, and we wield that&nbsp;authority&nbsp;in The Name of Jesus!<br /><br /><b>Let's help people see The Light! Darrell G. Wolfe</b><br /><br /><b>The Comment Threads:</b></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><a href="http://www.space.com/9699-top-10-strangest-space.html?fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524#f17c8b828">http://www.space.com/9699-top-10-strangest-space.html?fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524#f17c8b828</a></div><div class="stat_elem" style="-webkit-text-size-adjust: none; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uh5ej1_3" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">The bible says "God is light" not that he's like light, but that he IS light. If he, and his angels are composed of light, and we only see one spectrum of light, it stands to reason that there are angels around us and we can't see them, other's call them Djinn, aliens, alternate dimensions. They've been here far longer than we have. God's purpose in building the galaxies was for us to populate them. Make sure to get on his side and you may yet have the chance, as man's spirit lives forever, though his body doesn't.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</span><wbr style="color: #333333;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">p/faith.html</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uh5ej1_2" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiBlingBox postBlingBox" data-ft="{&quot;tn&quot;:&quot;O&quot;}" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" style="border-bottom-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; bottom: 1px; color: #3b5998; cursor: text; display: inline-block; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; position: relative; text-decoration: none;"><i class="img sp_7b7xx5 sx_f20296" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yr/r/UoiWcNiokdd.png); background-position: -14px -153px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; display: inline-block; height: 13px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: text-top; width: 15px;"></i><span class="text" style="line-height: 11px; cursor: pointer; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">In Response: Kind sir, Science doesn't mean atheist. We Christians have been doing science far longer than modern atheists and are the cause of many, if not most, of the major breakthroughs in science in the last 2,000. Please do not pretend that you have a corner on all science. Besides that, there is no scientific difference between discussing beings of an alternate dimension and angels. Definitions, my dear Watson, definitions.</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uh5ej1_12" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiBlingBox postBlingBox" data-ft="{&quot;tn&quot;:&quot;O&quot;}" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" style="border-bottom-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); vertical-align: text-bottom;">1</span></a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Like</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<abbr data-utime="1330056360" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Thursday, February 23, 2012 at 10:06pm">February 23 at 10:06pm</abbr></div></div></div></div><div class="postReplies fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-right: 11px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="img" src="https://fbcdn-profile-a.akamaihd.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/573513_1161581523_1319716999_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uh5ynp_2" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uh5ynp_2" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Energy produces light, so to say that God is light, is to say that God is energy. Same thing. So if energy can become matter, as Einstein theorized, than all that needs to happen for you to see a being made of energy/light is for that being to convert to matter so we can interact and then convert back to energy. As science and science fiction often follow each other, spurring each other on to high levels, the concept of turning matter to energy and back to matter has been discussed by serious scientists for a while now. Although it is still considered out of reach, it is no longer considered strictly impossible. Theoretically we just lack the advanced understanding to make it happen.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">http://</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">www.scientificamerican.com/</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">article.cfm?id=quotbeam-me-</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">upquot</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uh5ynp_1" style="color: #3b5998; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uh5ynp_5" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uh5ynp_5" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">To say that energy is the same as light, is to say, that energy is percieved as light by the senses. We see a "Lighting" storm. We don't call it an electricity storm, though that's what it is, we call is "lightning" so this definition of light is based on the sensory understanding.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">(*2,000 years)</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uh5ynp_4" style="color: #3b5998; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=714754146" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Thomas Lewis</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<i class="star img sp_3xz0q5 sx_827e8c" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yq/r/wPtZz4ZY7Nu.png); background-position: -13px -68px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; display: inline-block; height: 11px; width: 11px;"></i>&nbsp;Top Commenter Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Smithtown-High-School-East/106385912732155" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Smithtown High School East</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Darrell G. Wolfe look at the Vatican,they do real science,have a few large telescopes.see&nbsp;<a href="http://vaticanobservatory.org/" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">http://<wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span>vaticanobservatory.org/</a></div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uh5ynp_10" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150827738502524_25422559_10150836704887524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Like</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<abbr data-utime="1330337220" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Monday, February 27, 2012 at 4:07am">February 27 at 4:07am</abbr></div></div></div></div><div class="postReplies fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px; margin-top: 8px;"></div><div class="fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px;"></div></div></div></li><li class="fbFeedbackPost fbFirstPartyPost uiListItem fbCommentReply" id="fbc_10150827738502524_26620437_10151259699977524_reply" style="border-bottom-color: rgb(233, 233, 233); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-image: initial; border-left-color: rgb(233, 233, 233); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-color: rgb(233, 233, 233); border-right-style: solid; border-right-width: 0px; border-top-color: rgb(233, 233, 233); border-top-style: solid; border-top-width: 1px; border-width: initial; clear: both; display: block; padding-bottom: 0px !important; padding-top: 10px; position: relative;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix" style="zoom: 1;"><a aria-hidden="true" class="postActor UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_MED_Image" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="background-color: #ededed; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-right: 11px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="img" src="https://fbcdn-profile-a.akamaihd.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/573513_1161581523_1319716999_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uhkwoj_2" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uhkwoj_2" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Just had a thought about this. Man was made in the image of God. We are not natural, then having a spiritual experience. We are spirit, having a natural experience. Man is spirit first, soul (mind, will, emotions), then body. When you die, you leave your body, but you don't leave.&nbsp;</span></div><div class="text_exposed_root text_exposed" id="id_4fa145c578f861f34414981" style="display: inline;"><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Your brain is not your mind. Your brain is the tool with which your mind can gain access through your body to this world. Stories abound of people dying on operating tables and being located somewhere in the room, after death, they hear and see the whole conversation from their vantage point in the room away from their body. They then recount the conversation and visual actions to the people who were saving their lives. These stories are too numerous to be discounted.</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Therefore, YOU are energy, at your base too. It's not just God that is energy. YOU</span><span class="text_exposed_show" style="display: inline; font-size: 13px;">are energy, inhabiting a material body for a time on this planet. Then you leave, until you come back with your new body after the Resurrection of the dead and the coming of Jesus.&nbsp;</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><span class="text_exposed_show" style="display: inline;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span class="text_exposed_show" style="display: inline;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></span></div><span class="text_exposed_show" style="display: inline;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Of course, many will think that what I just said is nonsense. Then again, I think that anyone who actually believes we evolved from lower species without the slightest fossil evidence of an intermediary species is ridiculous. Did you know, for example, that according to Darwin's theory, there should be a fossil record of gradually evolving species. In fact, there should be MORE "in between" fossils than complete fossils. But in every case we see a fossil of a creature that is wholly what it is. The fossil record doesn't support gradual evolution but distinct species already developed.&nbsp;</span></div></span><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">So we'll agree to disagree. In the mean time, It's interesting to think about this energy/matter topic.&nbsp;</span></div></span></span></div></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhkwoj_1" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=0&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150827738502524_26620437_10151259699977524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Like</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<abbr class="timestamp" data-utime="1335969221" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Wednesday, May 2, 2012 at 9:33am">2 seconds ago</abbr></div></div></div></div></div></div></li></ul></div></div></div></div></li></ul><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: justify;">This was following a thread from:&nbsp;</div><a aria-hidden="true" class="postActor UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_MED_Image" href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100002026042247" style="-webkit-text-size-adjust: none; background-color: #ededed; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 14px; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-right: 11px; text-align: left;" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="img" src="https://fbcdn-profile-a.akamaihd.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/174111_100002026042247_5805939_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="-webkit-text-size-adjust: none; color: #333333; display: table-cell; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 14px; text-align: left; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb" style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;"><div class="closeButton" style="float: right; visibility: hidden;"><div class="uiSelector inlineBlock xSelector uiSelectorRight" style="display: inline-block; max-width: 200px; vertical-align: top; zoom: 1;"><div class="wrap" style="position: relative;"><a aria-haspopup="1" class="uiSelectorButton uiCloseButton" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="toggle" role="button" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding-box; background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-color: transparent; border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-image: initial; border-left-color: transparent; border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 1px; border-right-color: transparent; border-right-style: solid; border-right-width: 1px; border-top-color: transparent; border-top-style: solid; border-top-width: 1px; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; width: 15px; zoom: 1;" title="Report"></a></div></div></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100002026042247" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Josh Lucion</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/custom-showers-and-designer-floors/251185134901714" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Custom showers and designer floors.</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Ceramic-Tile-professonal/191787704219753" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Ceramic Tile professonal.</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Just because something cannot be seen doesn't mean its not there. You feel the pressure at high altitudes and low altitudes yet see no difference in the invisible air. The fact that the atomic world is very real and effects our lives only shows how close minded some people are to the invisible world. This will rock your brain, humans only see 1 spectrum of light, could be aliens right infront of you but living in a different wave length of light our eyes cannot see. However infrared and blue etc camera's can and if you have seen any videos in space of what they reveal, its a cluster of moving things almost like a vibrant living ocean.</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="ugtzog_28" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiBlingBox postBlingBox" data-ft="{&quot;tn&quot;:&quot;O&quot;}" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" style="border-bottom-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-position: -33px -170px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; display: inline-block; height: 13px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: text-top; width: 15px;"></i><span class="text" style="line-height: 11px; vertical-align: text-bottom;">28</span></a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150171105087524_23089463_10150547367537524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=neutral" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; border-bottom-color: transparent; border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; width: 15px; zoom: 1;" title="Report"></a></div></div></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/stacy.fisher.14" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Stacy Fisher</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<i class="star img sp_3xz0q5 sx_827e8c" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yq/r/wPtZz4ZY7Nu.png); background-position: -13px -68px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; display: inline-block; height: 11px; width: 11px;"></i>&nbsp;Top Commenter Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Background-Artist/113624202023500" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Background Artist</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/centralcasting" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Central Casting Los Angeles</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Stacy Paris The idea and observation of antimatter and its use as a potential rock fuel came long before Star Trek, but I like your post as you bring up some fair points. And science fiction and science are first cousin incestuous at this point anyway. Now black holes are extremely powerful phenomena and their presence is undeniable. Great jests of plasma shoot out of galaxies, a cluster of giant stars whip about the center of the Milky Way around an invisible point, light distorts, etc, and sub-atomic is certainly testable, as the properties of sub atomic particles are recorded daily. Electronics would not work if the properties of atoms and molecules weren't understood. Dark Matter, yes it is still at the level of understanding that not much definitive can be said about the matter yet.</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_53" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150547367537524_25339321_10150826658352524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uhodn2_56" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uhodn2_56" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">The bible says "God is light" not that he's like light, but that he IS light. If he, and his angels are composed of light, and we only see one spectrum of light, it stands to reason that there are angels around us and we can't see them, other's call them Djinn, aliens, alternate dimensions. They've been here far longer than we have. God's purpose in building the galaxies was for us to populate them. Make sure to get on his side and you may yet have the chance, as man's spirit lives forever, though his body doesn't.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">p/faith.html</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_55" style="color: #3b5998; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Central Casting Los Angeles</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Darrell G. Wolfe Oh Lord. This is a science site. If God is only light, who's atoms? ;-P</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_58" style="color: #3b5998; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb" style="color: #333333; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;"><div class="closeButton" style="float: right; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uhodn2_61" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Kind sir, Science doesn't mean atheist. We Christians have been doing science far longer than modern atheists and are the cause of many, if not most, of the major breakthroughs in science in the last 2,000. Please do not pretend that you have a corner on all science. Besides that, there is no scientific difference between discussing beings of an alternate dimension and angels. Definitions, my dear Watson, definitions.</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_60" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150547367537524_25362042_10150829142017524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Like</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<abbr data-utime="1330055542" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Thursday, February 23, 2012 at 9:52pm">February 23 at 9:52pm</abbr></div></div></div></div><div class="postReplies fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-right: 11px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="img" src="https://fbcdn-profile-a.akamaihd.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/573513_1161581523_1319716999_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uhodn2_64" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uhodn2_64" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">Energy produces light, so to say that God is light, is to say that God is energy. Same thing. So if energy can become matter, as Einstein theorized, than all that needs to happen for you to see a being made of energy/light is for that being to convert to matter so we can interact and then convert back to energy. As science and science fiction often follow each other, spurring each other on to high levels, the concept of turning matter to energy and back to matter has been discussed by serious scientists for a while now. Although it is still considered out of reach, it is no longer considered strictly impossible. Theoretically we just lack the advanced understanding to make it happen.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">http://</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">www.scientificamerican.com/</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">article.cfm?id=quotbeam-me-</span><wbr style="color: grey;"></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block; font-size: 13px;"></span><span style="font-size: 13px;">upquot</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_63" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150547367537524_25362196_10150829157792524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; margin-top: 8px;"></div><div class="fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px;"></div></div></div></li><li class="fbFeedbackPost fbFirstPartyPost uiListItem fbCommentReply" id="fbc_10150547367537524_25362254_10150829162697524_reply" style="-webkit-text-size-adjust: none; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-right: 11px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="img" src="https://fbcdn-profile-a.akamaihd.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/573513_1161581523_1319716999_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; text-align: justify;" /></a><br /><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;"><div class="postContainer fsl fwb fcb"><div class="closeButton" style="color: #333333; float: right; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; visibility: hidden;"><label class="uiCloseButton" for="uhodn2_67" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uhodn2_67" style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="button" /></label></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Author</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Bulldog-Publications/254404347926680" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Bulldog Publications</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">To say that energy is the same as light, is to say, that energy is percieved as light by the senses. We see a "Lighting" storm. We don't call it an electricity storm, though that's what it is, we call is "lightning" so this definition of light is based on the sensory understanding.&nbsp;</span></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;"><br /></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span><br /><div style="text-align: justify;"><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 13px;">(*2,000 years)</span></span></div><span style="color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px;"></span></div><div class="stat_elem" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_66" style="color: #3b5998; Wolfe</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Author/108744805817575" style="color: grey; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Incidentally, you say "Oh Lord", why not "Oh Buddha" or "Oh Darwin"... apparently you value one term over another?</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_69" style="color: #3b5998; border-image: initial; border-left-color: transparent; border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 1px; border-right-color: transparent; border-right-style: solid; border-right-width: 1px; border-top-color: transparent;
