padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; width: 15px; zoom: 1;" title="Report"></a></div></div></div><div style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-align: justify; text-decoration: none;"><a class="profileName" href="https://www.facebook.com/stacy.fisher.14" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Stacy Fisher</a><span class="fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<i class="star img sp_3xz0q5 sx_827e8c" style="background-image: url(https://s-static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yq/r/wPtZz4ZY7Nu.png); background-position: -13px -68px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; display: inline-block; height: 11px; width: 11px;"></i>&nbsp;Top Commenter Â·&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Background-Artist/113624202023500" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Background Artist</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a class="uiLinkSubtle" href="https://www.facebook.com/centralcasting" style="color: grey; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Central Casting Los Angeles</a></span></div><div class="postContent fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px;"><div class="postText" style="color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 28px; margin-top: 0px; text-align: justify;">Darrell G. Wolfe Ok so you say that light can become matter and vice versa. And you're right. So why not just say God is light and matter (and the laws of the universe), or just the universe, rather than your initial claim that only light was God. But no matter. I am a pantheist, not an atheist. And yes, many theologians have done some great science in the past, but they stick to the scientific process, they don't reach into the bible to support their claims.</div><div class="stat_elem"><div class="action_links fsm fwn fcg" style="margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: justify;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" id="uhodn2_72" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Reply</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<a ajaxify="/ajax/connect/vote.php?show_all_replies=1&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;id=fbc_10150547367537524_25370964_10150830144022524&amp;in_moderation_queue=0&amp;view_as_moderator=0&amp;in_aggregated_view=0&amp;in_contextual_dialog=0&amp;controller_id=feedback_25qxnZb36ACHTyI8d&amp;owns_pages=1&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;vote=up" class="fbUpDownVoteOption" href="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/comments.php?channel_url=http%3A%2F%2Fstatic.ak.facebook.com%2Fconnect%2Fxd_arbiter.php%3Fversion%3D5%23cb%3Df3780d1124%26origin%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.space.com%252Ff2dec2a60%26domain%3Dwww.space.com%26relation%3Dparent.parent&amp;fb_comment_id=fbc_10150827738502524_25362280_10150829163892524&amp;href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.space.com%2F9699-top-10-strangest-space.html&amp;locale=en_US&amp;numposts=10&amp;sdk=joey&amp;width=575#" rel="async-post" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;">Like</a>&nbsp;Â·&nbsp;<abbr data-utime="1330101026" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Friday, February 24, 2012 at 10:30am">February 24 at 10:30am</abbr></div></div></div></div></div></div></li></ul><br />Well Stacy: That's basically what I DID say...&nbsp;<span style="text-align: justify;">HA HA HA... so deceived.&nbsp;</span><br /><span style="text-align: justify;"><br /></span><br /><span style="text-align: justify;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span>
